title: Status Effect Bars Reforged
description: A client-side mod that adds small customizable bars to the status effects overlay and in the inventory to show the remaining duration of effects.
body:
## Description

A client-side Neo/Forge mod that adds small customizable bars to the status effects overlay and in the inventory to show the remaining duration of effects. Support is available on [Discord](https://discord.gg/m4EHeRjfZ9) !

Features:

- Cute little bars
- Config screen to edit colors and bar positions
- Bars can be hidden automatically in some specific cases to reduce clutter (e.g. beacon effects and effects with very long durations)

![Bars on the HUD](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/456/372/hud.png)

![Bars in the inventory](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/456/374/inventory.png)

## **As of v1.0.2 it now includes compat with [Stylish Effects](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/stylish-effects) !**

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1284599/description_5fc1474e-ac51-4783-b4a2-0affff40a52a.png)



### Credits

- Potentially inspired by [SkyUI](https://www.nexusmods.com/skyrim/mods/3863)'s active effects HUD
- `pt_br` translation by [FITFC](https://github.com/FITFC)
- [A5b84](https://www.curseforge.com/members/a5b84/projects) for the [Fabric version](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/status-effect-bars)
